prompt: Create an ultra-realistic cinematic coffee commercial image featuring one tall clear glass of creamy latte suspended mid-air at a slight diagonal tilt, as if slowly spinning. The glass has distinct caramel coffee layers, a thick white foam cap, and a dusting of cocoa powder across the top. Warm steam rises in soft curling wisps from the foam. Surround the glass with exactly 2 large sculptural milk splash ribbons spiraling around it, one sweeping upward along the left side and one curling around the lower right, plus many suspended coffee droplets, milk droplets, and floating coffee beans frozen in slow motion. Add a vertical cloud of fine cocoa dust particles glowing on the right side of the frame. Use a dark cozy café background with golden bokeh lights, blurred shelves and bottles, warm amber highlights, shallow depth of field, dramatic rim lighting, glossy reflections on the glass, high-speed macro photography look, premium beverage advertising style, sharp focus on the latte and splashes, rich contrast, vertical composition.
